allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; [print\(f\\"{b['name']:12} {b['rating']:.0f}  {b['wins']}W {b['losses']}L {b['draws']}D \({b['matchesPlayed']} played\)\\"\) for b in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d['match']; t=d['turns']; print\(m['botAName'],'vs',m['botBName'],'on',m['mapName'],m['scoreA'],'-',m['scoreB']\); print\('turns:',len\(t\)\); print\('grid rows:',len\(t[0]['anfield'].split\(chr\(10\)\)\),'cols:',len\(t[0]['anfield'].split\(chr\(10\)\)[0]\)\); print\('last turn piece:',repr\(t[-1]['piece']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['bot']['status']\); print\(\(d['buildLog'] or ''\)[:500]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; [print\(p['name'], '| bots:', p['bots'], '| best:', p['bestBot'], p['bestRating'] and round\(p['bestRating']\), '| W-L:', p['wins'],'-',p['losses']\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('player:', d['player']['name'], '| bots:', [b['name'] for b in d['bots']], '| matches:', len\(d['matches']\)\)")
